---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
execute:
  enabled: false
---

Параметр $\mu$ задаёт среднее, $\sigma$ — ширину.
Три случая: $(\mu,\sigma)=(0,1),(0,2),(2,1)$.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
import numpy as np

x = np.linspace(-6, 6, 400)
for mu, sigma in [(0, 1), (0, 2), (2, 1)]:
    pdf = np.exp(-0.5*((x-mu)/sigma)**2)/(sigma*np.sqrt(2*np.pi))
```

![](../shared/figures/generated/normal_density_profiles.png){width=58% .nostretch}
